UserAssessment.title: User Assessment
UserAssessment.description: Stores the results of a user's career growth path assessment.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

answers.description: The raw answers provided by the user.

scores.description: The calculated scores for each dimension.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the assessment was completed.

/user_assessments/{assessmentId}.description: A collection of user assessment results.
